This port is This port is part of the metaport: pnet. Dhn, you could pass pnet and ml-pnet for araujo@FreeBSD.org? The other ports, pnet-base and pnetlib are with him. --001636c5ac7a4e334e046cfa6a16 Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Sorry, here's diff.
